task: Find the statistics on major causes of death for people 65 and older in the US in 2002 (attach the url to the statistics) and list five top diseases. For each disease, please tell me which main specialty it belongs to (except Geriatrics) and find out which hospital in the US is the best for this specialty according to US News ranking.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the task. It accurately identified the CDC report for 2002 leading causes of death for people 65 and older in the US and provided the correct URL. Despite initial challenges with PDF text extraction due to environment limitations (missing libraries), the agent demonstrated strong problem-solving by using browser navigation and screenshot analysis to locate the specific table on page 14 of the PDF. It correctly listed the top five diseases, mapped each to an appropriate medical specialty (excluding Geriatrics as requested), and identified the best US hospital for each specialty according to US News 2024-2025 rankings, providing relevant citations. The final output is well-structured, complete, and accurate, directly addressing all user requirements.
